Appearances:
Plaintiff Marta Elias is present.
Attorney Natali Garcia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christopher Torres is present.
Attorney Kathleen Lu representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-28-2013 remains on calendar.
